title: berkheya spinosissima
intro: Berkheya spinosissima, also known as the white daisy or African daisy, is an annual or perennial flowering plant native to South Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Berkheya spinosissima include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as possessing antimicrobial and antifungal properties that can help to prevent infections. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments including fever, colds, and skin conditions.
